evals.name: fast-mode-update
evals.prompt: Triage returned: Existing nodes (→ sync): docs/rate-limiter-service.md — matches RateLimiter refactor. Connected: [[api-gateway]] | Tags: rate-limiting, architecture. The doc currently says 'implemented as Express middleware' but the code was refactored to a standalone service class. Run fast sync.
evals.expected_output: Reads docs/rate-limiter-service.md and the changed code file. Finds the 'Express middleware' claim is outdated. Edits the doc in-place to reflect the service class implementation. Sync report lists the doc as updated with what changed.

assertions.description: Trace shows the code file was read before comparing — not just the doc
docs/rate-limiter-service.md is edited to fix the outdated claim
Report uses the Sync Report (fast) format with Updated/No changes needed sections
Report describes what was changed (e.g., 'middleware → service class')

evals.name: skip-when-no-existing
evals.prompt: Triage returned: No existing matches found. All items classified as new. New (→ capture): BullMQ job queue — no matching node. Run sync.
evals.expected_output: Sync immediately recognizes triage found no existing nodes. Cites the skip-sync rule explicitly. Does not fall back to full mode. Routes directly to capture.

assertions.description: The explicit rule 'If triage returns only new items, skip sync' is cited or referenced
Does NOT run a full audit — stays in fast-mode path or explicitly skips
Output indicates capture should run next for the new items

evals.name: full-mode-audit
evals.prompt: Run a full knowledge audit. Assume docs/ has: api-gateway.md (mentions port 3000), auth-service.md (wikilinks to [[session-store]] but session-store.md does not exist), cache-service.md (no wikilinks, tags: infrastructure). The actual api-gateway code runs on port 8080.
evals.expected_output: Full mode reads all docs, surveys codebase. Finds: Doc≠Code: api-gateway.md port claim wrong (3000 vs 8080) — fixes it. Broken wikilink: auth-service.md→session-store (file missing). Missing wikilink suggestion: cache-service ↔ api-gateway (shared infrastructure tag). Report covers all three categories.

assertions.description: api-gateway.md port claim is edited in-place (3000 → 8080)
Broken wikilink [[session-store]] in auth-service.md is reported in the Broken Wikilinks section
cache-service ↔ api-gateway missing wikilink is suggested based on shared tags
Report uses the Sync Report (full) format with Code→No Doc, Doc→No Code/Doc≠Code, Broken Wikilinks, Missing Wikilinks sections
